reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/supplication (dhikr) asking for forgiveness, with no extremist content
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدكَ ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لا إِلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتْوبُ إِلَيْك
